title: tockAuditedNote
description: tockAuditedNote schema from Tock Guest Model

lastUpdatedBy.description: The account in Tock that made the last update to this note, whether that be the guest or someone using the Tock Dashboard.

lastUpdatedAtTimestampMs.description: The timestamp when the note was created or updated, in milliseconds since the Unix Epoch.

previousVersionId.description: A unique identifier for the update or creation of the note. Used internally by Tock.

noteType.description: The type of note this represents.
